scripts.setup: npm install && pnpm install --dir frontend && uv sync --project backend
scripts.db:migrate: uv run --project backend alembic -c backend/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.dev: npm run db:migrate && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "uv run --project backend uvicorn src.api:app --reload --host :: --port 8765 --app-dir backend" "until python -c \"import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/health', timeout=1)\" >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.2; done; pnpm --dir frontend dev"
